short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $1.41B in FY2026 Q1, +20.0% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.

short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is mixed — execution risk on the next guide is elevated.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $5B — in cyclical drawdown.

Sector thesis (Communication Services): Ad spending normalization + AI-driven engagement reshaping the long-run growth profile.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if the next 2–4 quarters confirm a stabilization in trajectory.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 78.0% — elevated (premium-selling favored).
Put/Call OI: 0.75 — balanced flow.

short_term.strategy: Sell 30–45 DTE cash-secured put at $178 (5% OTM). High IV (78%) + uptrend → collect premium with a willingness to be assigned at a discount. Roll if breached, otherwise let theta decay.

Available long-dated expiries: 8 dates spanning 91–609 DTE.

long_term.strategy: Sell 6-month strangle: short $169 put / short $207 call. Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling on both sides; profits if spot stays within ±10%; manage with rolls or assignment.
